Evidence Level: Basic

CogniLand

Free cognitive training platform with no registration required for basic access.

About This Tool

CogniLand offers free, accessible brain exercises for processing speed, attention, memory, and executive function without financial barriers.

How It Helps

  • Processing speed — reaction time exercises
  • Attention — visual scanning games
  • Memory — short-term challenges
  • Executive function — planning tasks
  • Accessibility — free, no registration
  • Low pressure — suitable for low-energy days

Best For

Memory & Brain Fog

Basic exercises during fatigue

Anxiety & Panic

No-commitment environment

ADHD & Focus

Short games build stamina

Depression & Mood

No-cost access removes barriers

Visit CogniLand →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

Brain Workshop

Free open-source dual n-back.

Peak

40+ games with tracking.

MindGamer

Focus and speed training.
